mapper.select: /* selectWarekey */ SELECT ${userData.schema}.FN_MD_WAREKEY() AS WAREKEY FROM DUAL

/* selectWarehousePrinterList */ SELECT WMPTRNM, WSPTRNM FROM ${userData.schema}.MWARMA
AND WAREKEY = '${warekey}'

/* selectWarehousePrinter */ SELECT WMPTRNM, WSPTRNM FROM ${userData.schema}.MWARMA
AND WAREKEY = '${warekey}'

/* selectShipOrderYn */ SELECT SHPORYN FROM ${userData.schema}.MWARMA
AND WAREKEY = '${warekey}'

/* selectAreaRelationList */ SELECT MAR.WAREKEY, MAR.AREAKEY, MAR.AREATYP, MAR.AREANAM FROM ${userData.schema}.MAREMA MAR INNER JOIN ${userData.schema}.MWARMA MWA ON (MWA.WAREKEY = MAR.WAREKEY) WHERE MWA.WHUSEYN = 'Y' AND MAR.ARUSEYN = 'Y'
AND MAR.WAREKEY = #{param.warekey}
